name: CustomerDemo
description: Simplest possible example: 1 table, 1 calculated field (FullName = LastName + FirstName), 3 rows

name: BASIC: Jessica Talisman's Ontology
description: 9-table workflow model: Workflows, Steps, Roles, Agents with approval gates and delegation chains

name: ADVANCED: Jessica Talisman's Ontology
description: Extends BASIC with additional business rules, inferences, and cross-entity calculations

name: is-everything-a-language
description: Meta-ontology exploring the thesis that all representations are languages with syntax, semantics, and pragmatics

name: DEMO: StarTrek TV Shows
description: Fun domain example: TV series, seasons, episodes, characters demonstrating the pattern on familiar data
